title: pelargonium × dependens
intro: Pelargonium × dependens, also known as Red Form or Dependens, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, resulting from the cross between Pelargonium cucullatum and Pelargonium peltatum. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × dependens include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
